titulo: Next-generation Constitutional Classifiers: More efficient protection against universal jailbreaks
resumen: Anthropic presenta Constitutional Classifiers++, un sistema de seguridad mejorado que protege a Claude de ataques de jailbreak reduciendo costes computacionales. La nueva arquitectura de dos etapas usa sondas internas y métodos ensemble para lograr la tasa de ataques exitosos más baja jamás probada.
contenido:
Anthropic introduces Constitutional Classifiers++, an improved safety system that protects Claude from jailbreak attacks while reducing computational costs. The new two-stage architecture uses internal probes and ensemble methods to achieve "the lowest successful attack rate of any approach we've ever tested" with minimal performance impact on legitimate queries.

[Leer artículo completo](https://www.anthropic.com/research/next-generation-constitutional-classifiers)
